| 1 | 2 | "Show me it running." | core | mech | Domain IV | NIST AI RMF — MEASURE (TEVV); TEVV — verification vs. validation | Verification proves built-to-spec; validation proves it does the real job in the real context. Only a live run validates. |
| 1 | 3 | A green test suite is only as honest as its assumptions. | core | mech | Domain III | NIST AI RMF — MEASURE (TEVV); NIST AI RMF — trustworthy characteristic: valid and reliable | A test sharing the code's assumptions measures agreement, not validity — anchor TEVV evidence outside the system under test. |
| 1 | 6 | What you configure is not what runs. | core | mech | Domain III | NIST AI RMF — MEASURE (TEVV); EU AI Act — record-keeping and logging (high-risk obligation, concept level) | Configuration states intent; logs state behavior. Verify and govern the behavior, not the file. |

| 7 | 11 | A setting that must cross a privilege boundary has to trav |  | mech | Domain III | NIST AI RMF — secure and resilient (trustworthy characteristic); EU AI Act — cybersecurity obligation (concept level) | Values that must cross a privilege boundary ride channels defined to cross it; ambient state is dropped by design. |
| 7 | 25 | One shared event loop makes any single blocking call a who |  | mech | Domain III | NIST AI RMF — valid and reliable (trustworthy characteristic); NIST AI RMF — MEASURE (TEVV) | One blocking call on a shared loop freezes the app; fix structurally off the loop and test-lock the invariant. |

| 7 | 41 | To land on a branch others are actively pushing to, use an |  | mech | Domain I | NIST AI RMF — GOVERN; ISO/IEC 42001 — plan-do-check-act | Land concurrent change with operations that refuse on conflict; verbal all-clears are never synchronized with shared state. |
| 7 | 42 | A coordination discipline that works for one actor becomes |  | mech | Domain I | NIST AI RMF — GOVERN; ISO/IEC 42001 — continual improvement (plan-do-check-act) | Scale the mechanism a discipline rides on, not just the rule; shared-append state caps coordination at one actor. |
| 7 | 52 | The worktree-isolation quirk can switch the main checkout' |  | mech | Domain I | NIST AI RMF — MANAGE | Path and branch are independent facts; guard the invariant at the action point, and trust guards only after they catch. |
| 7 | 58 | A side effect placed before the point a process can still  |  | mech | Domain III | NIST AI RMF — MEASURE (TEVV); NIST AI RMF — secure and resilient (trustworthy characteristic) | Side effects upstream of a fork-and-exit point run in every process; place them after the last handoff. |
| 7 | 64 | When you fix a defect of a particular shape, scan the code |  | mech | Domain III | ISO/IEC 42001 — continual improvement (plan-do-check-act); NIST AI RMF — MANAGE | A defect with a shape indicts every sibling built from the same template; close the class before closing the ticket. |
| 7 | 73 | A long-"deferred" code path is where bugs hide from each o |  | mech | Domain III | NIST AI RMF — MEASURE (TEVV) | Dormant code accumulates masked, plural faults; activate it as discovery work against an empirical oracle, never against its comments. |
| 7 | 75 | Cross-stream seams that merge separately must connect by r |  | mech | Domain III | NIST AI RMF — GOVERN; NIST AI RMF — secure and resilient (trustworthy characteristic) | Across merge boundaries, late modules register into early anchors — never the reverse — and absence fails toward the restrictive posture. |
| 7 | 76 | Put a carve-out where the rule actually fires, not where i |  | mech | Domain I | EU AI Act — technical documentation (concept level); NIST AI RMF — GOVERN | Filenames are claims; the call graph is truth. Amend a rule only at its single, verified enforcement point. |
| 7 | 80 | A frozen-dataclass exception type masks an unexpected rais |  | mech | Domain III | NIST AI RMF — MEASURE (TEVV) | Infrastructure-flavored errors often mask the real raise; read the wrapped exception, and keep control fixtures contract-complete. |
| 7 | 89 | Reference paths are for reading; writes go to the worktree |  | mech | Domain I | NIST AI RMF — MEASURE (TEVV); NIST AI RMF — GOVERN | Reading paths and writing paths are different permissions; verify every artifact landed inside the isolation boundary before commit. |
